mapper.insert: insert into tbl_subscription (member_id, tier, billing_cycle, status, expires_at) values (#{memberId}, #{tier}, #{billingCycle}, #{status}, #{expiresAt}::timestamp)
mapper.select: select id, member_id, tier, billing_cycle, status, started_at, expires_at, created_datetime, updated_datetime, quartz from tbl_subscription where member_id = #{memberId} and status = 'active' order by id desc limit 1
select id, member_id, tier, billing_cycle, status, started_at, expires_at, created_datetime, updated_datetime, quartz from tbl_subscription where status = 'active' and expires_at < now()
mapper.update: update tbl_subscription set quartz = #{quartz}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_subscription set expires_at = expires_at + interval '1 minute', updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
update tbl_subscription set tier = #{tier}, billing_cycle = #{billingCycle}, expires_at = started_at + interval '1 year' where id = #{id}
update tbl_subscription set status = #{status}, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
